title: opt_share: unsound optimization (missing sequential signal bits check)
body:
```
$ cat t.v
module t(input [3:0] A, input [3:0] B, input [3:0] C, input S, output [3:0] Y);
wire [3:0] t = A + C;
assign Y = S ? A + B : {4{t[0]}};
endmodule
$ yosys -p 'eval -set A 0 -set B 0 -set C 3 -set S 0' t.v
[...]
Eval result: \Y = 4'1111.
[...]
$ yosys -p 'opt_share; eval -set A 0 -set B 0 -set C 3 -set S 0' t.v
[...]
Eval result: \Y = 4'0011.
[...]
```
